headline: Walmart CEO Doug McMillon Earns 976 Times More Than Median Employee Last Fiscal Year
summary: Walmart Inc CEO Doug McMillon was paid 976 times more than the median associate in the world's largest retail company over the last fiscal year.

headline: Cathie Wood's Ark Invest Hoards Palantir Stock Ahead Of Q1 Earnings, Adds More Of This Buffett-Backed EV Bet, Buys Meta, Roku Earnings Dip
summary: Ark, which prides itself as an investor in disruptive innovation, increased its holdings of two AI plays and also resumed purchases of a Chinese EV stock.

headline: Benzinga Bulls And Bears: Tesla, Microsoft, Trump Media, Palantir, And Trader Predicts 4 Meme Coins To Echo Dogecoin, Shiba Inu
summary:
Benzinga examined the prospects for many investors’ favorite stocks over the last week — here’s a look at some of our top stories.



The S&P 500 and Nasdaq just had their best week since November, rising 2.7% and 4.2% respectively, ending their recent streaks of losses. The Dow also increased slightly by 0.7%.

headline: Warren Buffett's Real Estate Firm Coughs Up $250M To Avoid Bigger Payout Over Commissions
summary: HomeServices of America, the real estate firm owned by Warren Buffett, has agreed to pay $250 million to settle a nationwide antitrust lawsuit.

headline: Facebook Co-Founder Brings Back Old Memories As He Alleges Elon Musk's Tesla Will Be The Next 'Enron' — Here's What You Should Know About The Company That Is Etched In History Books For Corporate Fraud
summary: As Moskovitz compares Tesla to Enron, here's what you should know about the commodities firm, which was repeatedly hailed as America's "most innovative" and became an enduring symbol of corporate fraud later.

headline: Tesla Calms Investors After Dismal Q1, Fisker Buyout Buzz, BYD Enters Pickup Game And More: Biggest EV Stories Of The Week
summary: For now, Tesla has avoided a major setback, but the days ahead will reveal whether the company's direction is sufficient to engineer a fundamental turnaround.

headline: 'You'll Be Amazed:' Elon Musk Urges Tesla Drivers To Try Supervised Full Self-Driving Software
Antony Blinken Says US Chip Ban Doesn't Mean 'Cutting Off Trade' Or 'Holding Back China'
summary: U.S. Secretary of State Antony Blinken clarified that U.S. export controls aim solely to limit access to sensitive technology that could threaten national security, not to hinder China's economic or technological progress.

headline: US, China Set To Hold First High-Level Talks On AI, Blinken Confirms: TikTok 'Did Not Come Up' In Discussion
summary: The U.S. and China have agreed to hold their first high-level talks on AI, as confirmed by U.S. Secretary of State Antony Blinken.

headline: Despite Microsoft, Google's 'Spectacular Quarters,' Billionaire 'Bond King' Bill Gross Warns Against Tech, Advocates For Value Stocks
summary: Bill Gross, known as the "bond king," advises investors to avoid tech stocks despite strong quarters from Microsoft and Alphabet, recommending value stocks instead, while questioning the appeal of bonds with current yields.

headline: Jim Cramer Weighs In Ahead Of Apple, Amazon, Eli Lilly Earnings: 'We Have To Run Such A Ridiculous Gauntlet Next Week'
summary: Jim Cramer has highlighted upcoming significant events for investors, including earnings from major companies like Apple and Amazon, and key economic indicators such as the Federal Reserve meeting and employment data.

headline: Tesla To Cut 693 Jobs In Nevada Amid Global Workforce Reduction: Government Notice
summary: Tesla Inc. is reportedly set to lay off 693 employees at its Nevada facilities as part of the 10% layoff announced by the company.

headline: 'Check Your Inbox!': Tesla Sends Out Expedited Cybertruck Delivery Invites To Long-Term Shareholders
Tesla Increases Price Of Model 3 Performance By $1K In US Days After Launch
summary: EV giant Tesla Inc has hiked the price of its new Model 3 Performance in the U.S. by $1000, merely days after its launch.

headline: Goodbye Google Gemini? Apple In Talks With Microsoft-Backed OpenAI For iPhone AI Features: Report
summary: Apple has resumed discussions with Microsoft-backed OpenAI about incorporating the startup's AI technology into the upcoming iPhone features.

headline: Tesla 'Is Now Enron, Folks:' Facebook Co-Founder Claims Musk's EV Giant Is Cooking Up Some FSD Data
summary: Moskovitz, who also serves as CEO of work-management platform Asana, suggested that Tesla could face legal repercussions.

headline: Elon Musk Claps Back At Facebook Co-Founder's Consumer Fraud Accusations Against Tesla: 'Should Go To Jail For Impersonating A Smart Person'
summary: Elon Musk responded to accusations by Facebook co-founder Dustin Moskovitz, who likened Tesla's business practices to Enron's fraud, alleging massive consumer and securities fraud by Tesla.
